name: charter
description: Know the project + own the owner relationship. At SessionStart, a compact proportional brief that gates substantive work on the project's Claude-facing docs: quality attributes (Lighthouse-aligned for web), a project map (file→responsibility index, for blast radius), recorded decisions/ADRs (the alignment anchor — don't reverse without consulting), a roadmap/backlog, stack notes, and the project's established conventions (reuse before create) — generating them from code/git when missing and going quiet once they're summarised in CLAUDE.md (claude-companion marker). Owns the non-technical owner loop: confirm intent in plain language → demonstrate the result back → recap. /charter:align reconciles open/proposed work against recorded decisions + roadmap on demand (clean ≠ correct). Action-time consent for consequential/irreversible operations is enforced natively (settings.json auto mode + deny/ask rules), not a charter hook. Read-only over the project — it detects and the model authors the docs.
